title: asteriscus daltonii subsp. daltonii
intro: Asteriscus daltonii subsp. daltonii, also known as the annual or biennial Asteriscus, is a plant species within the daisy family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is rich in sesquiterpenes and has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Asteriscus daltonii subsp. daltonii include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and combating bacterial infections, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Asteriscus daltonii subsp. daltonii include essential oil extracts, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
